definition: To make something have no effect; to state that something does not exist or is not true.
examples: These results do not negate the previous findings.
He simply negated any responsibility for the error.

definition: A system of connected people or things, such as computers, roads, or social contacts.
examples: The university has a strong network of alumni.
Computers on the same network can share files easily.

definition: Not supporting any side in an argument, fight, or war; having no strong or clear quality or effect.
examples: The country remained neutral during the conflict.
Try to use neutral language in academic writing.

definition: In spite of what has just been said; however.
examples: The task was difficult; nevertheless, we completed it on time.
The sample size is small; nevertheless, the results are useful.
translationFa: با این حال؛ با وجود این
translationEn: in spite of what was said

definition: In spite of what has just been said or done; nevertheless.
examples: The method is not perfect; nonetheless, it is widely used.
She was tired; nonetheless, she agreed to help.
translationFa: با این وجود؛ با این حال

definition: A situation or pattern of behavior that is usual or expected in a particular group or society.
examples: In many countries, working long hours has become the norm.
Social norms influence how people behave in public.

definition: Usual, typical, or expected; not strange or unusual.
examples: It is normal to feel nervous before an exam.
After the storm, life slowly returned to normal.

definition: An idea, opinion, or belief about something.
examples: He rejected the notion that money brings happiness.
Different cultures have different notions of success.

definition: Despite something; in spite of something.
examples: Notwithstanding the difficulties, the team completed the project.
There were some complaints, the overall response notwithstanding.

definition: Relating to the energy produced by splitting atoms; relating to weapons that use this energy; relating to the central part of something.
examples: The country is reducing its reliance on nuclear power.
Nuclear weapons are a major global concern.
translationEn: relating to the nucleus or atomic energy
